title: Privacy Policy | Çorbacı
description: Çorbacı website does not collect or store any personal data. Learn about our privacy policy.
keywords: privacy policy, personal data protection, corbaci privacy

parts.title: Privacy Policy
content: This website does not collect any personal data.
No cookies, tracking systems or analytics tools are used on this site. No data about visitors is collected or stored.

parts.title: No Data Stored
content: No user data is held on our servers or in any other system.
The ordering process is carried out exclusively via WhatsApp. Information shared through WhatsApp is used solely for fulfilling the order and is not shared with third parties.

parts.title: No Use of Personal Data
content: No personal data is used for advertising, analytics or marketing purposes.

parts.title: Contact
content: If you have any questions about our privacy policy, please get in touch:
list: Address: Atatürk Caddesi No: 1 Merkez / Istanbul
